title: Shankumugham Beach
tagline: Shankumugham Beach — beach town of Kerala

overview.short: Shankumugham Beach is a beach in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala, south India.
overview.description: Shankumugham Beach is a beach in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala, south India. The beach is on the western side of Thiruvananthapuram and is very close to Thiruvananthapuram International Airport. Shanghumugham beach is considered as the ‘Arattukadavu’ of Sri Ananthapadmanabhan - the presiding deity of the city. Thousands of Hindus perform ‘Bali Tharpanam’ during special occasions.

topPlaces.name: Anchuthengu
topPlaces.description: Anchuthengu ("Five Coconut Palms"), formerly known as Anjengo, Angengo or Anjenga, is a coastal panchayath and town in the Thiruvananthapuram District of Kerala. It is situated 9 km south-west of Varkala Town along Trivandrum - Varkala - Kollam coastal highway.

topPlaces.name: Rajiv Gandhi Academy for Aviation Technology
topPlaces.description: Rajiv Gandhi Academy for Aviation Technology (RAGAAT) is a state-owned pilot training institute run by the Government of Kerala, India. It is situated at the Thiruvananthapuram International Airport.

image.alt: Rajiv Gandhi Academy for Aviation Technology

topPlaces.name: Vettucaud
topPlaces.description: Vettucaud is located on the north-west coast of Thiruvananthapuram. The Madre De Deus Church (Mother of God Church) is situated in Vettucaud.

topPlaces.name: Mall of Travancore
topPlaces.description: Mall of Travancore (MOT) is a shopping mall located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. Developed by Malabar Group, it is the first shopping mall in Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Mother of God Church, Vettukad
topPlaces.description: The Madre de Deus Church, also known as the Mother of God Church ("mother of God" in Portuguese/Latin), is a church located in Vettukad in Kerala, India's Thiruvananthapuram district.

topPlaces.name: Valiathura
topPlaces.description: Valiathura was a major port of Thiruvananthapuram city, the capital of Kerala, India. It is one of the oldest ports in India.

topPlaces.name: Perunthanni
topPlaces.description: Perunthanni is a suburb of Thiruvananthapuram, the capital of the Indian state of Kerala. This place is situated on Vetti Muricha Kotta-Westfort-Enchakkal Road.

topPlaces.name: Pettah, Thiruvananthapuram
topPlaces.description: Pettah is an urban neighbourhood of Thiruvananthapuram, the capital of the Indian state of Kerala. Strategically located near the Thiruvananthapuram International Airport and along the main road connecting key city areas, Pettah has historically served as a gateway to the city.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shankumugham Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shankumugham Beach is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shankumugham Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (1 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shankumugham Beach?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shankumugham Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shankumugham Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Shankumugham Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shankumugham Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Anchuthengu, Rajiv Gandhi Academy for Aviation Technology, Vettucaud, Mall of Travancore, Mother of God Church, Vettukad.
